dashboard.label: Linux Security Monitoring Dashboard — Ubuntu 24.04 STIG Hardened

panel.title: T1110 — Brute Force: Failed SSH Login Attempts

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | timechart span=1h count as "Failed Logins"

panel.title: T1548.003 — Sudo and Sudo Caching: Privilege Escalation Events

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=linux_audit type=USER_CMD | rex field=_raw "UID=\"(?P<user>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "cmd=(?P<cmd_hex>[0-9A-Fa-f]+)" | eval command=urldecode(replace(cmd_hex,"([0-9A-Fa-f]{2})","%\1")) | eval readable_time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table readable_time, host, user, command | sort -readable_time | head 20 | rename readable_time as "Time", host as "Host", user as "User", command as "Command"

panel.title: T1562.006 — Log Source Heartbeat: Indicator Removal on Host

search.query: index=pci_compliance host=ubuntu-openscap | timechart span=1h count by sourcetype

panel.title: T1078 — Valid Accounts: Authentication Success vs Failure

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=linux_secure ("Accepted password" OR "Accepted publickey" OR "Failed password") | eval result=if(match(_raw,"Failed"),"Failure","Success") | timechart span=1h count by result

panel.title: T1046 — Network Service Discovery: UFW Blocked Connections

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=ufw "UFW BLOCK" | rex field=_raw "DPT=(?P<dest_port>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "SRC=(?P<src_ip>[\d.]+)" | stats count by dest_port, src_ip | sort -count | rename dest_port as "Destination Port", src_ip as "Source IP" | head 10

panel.title: T1543 — Create or Modify System Process: File Integrity Changes

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=linux_audit type=PATH earliest=0 | rex field=_raw "name=\"(?P<filepath>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "nametype=(?P<nametype>\w+)" | search nametype=NORMAL OR nametype=CREATE OR nametype=DELETE | search filepath="/etc/*" | eval action=case( nametype="CREATE","File Created", nametype="DELETE","File Deleted", nametype="NORMAL","File Accessed", 1=1,"Unknown") | eval readable_time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table readable_time, host, action, filepath | sort - readable_time | head 20 | rename readable_time as "Time", host as "Host", action as "Action", filepath as "File Path"

panel.title: T1070 — Indicator Removal: Time Sync Integrity (Chrony)

search.query: index=pci_compliance sourcetype=syslog "chronyd[" | rex field=_raw "chronyd\[\d+\]: (?P<chrony_event>.+)" | search chrony_event!="" | table _time, host, chrony_event | sort - _time | head 10 | rename time as "Time", host as "Host", chrony_event as "Chrony Event"

index=pci_compliance sourcetype=openscap_score earliest=0 | rex field=_raw "compliance_score=(?P<score>[\d.]+)" | rex field=_raw "scan=(?P<scan_type>\S+)" | where isnotnull(score) AND score!="" | eval score_pct=round(tonumber(score),2)."%" | dedup scan_type sortby -_time | eval readable_time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table readable_time, host, scan_type, score_pct | sort _time | rename readable_time as "Time", host as "Host", scan_type as "Scan Type", score_pct as "Score Percent"
